title: Ombudsmen Act 1975 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand public law establishing the office of Ombudsman, their investigative powers, procedures for complaint handling, and oversight of public service agencies and state enterprises. This foundational legislation defines accountability mechanisms and institutional governance for complaint resolution.
